metadata.mode: prospective W7 replay; outcome unknown at lock time; decision citable under ANY outcome

PO_shadow_oracle.audit_injection: PO is injected by constructor as a shadow-oracle forecaster. It may use audit access to full world state only to simulate the next observables; policy sees only the forecast fraction.
PO_shadow_oracle.derivation_gap_scope: The derivation-gap reading (PO>R0, PD~R0) bundles hidden-state unknowability with learning limitations — recorded as such, not attributed to learning alone.
PO_shadow_oracle.non_derivable_label: PO knows the WORLD's transition rules, never agent internals; upper-bound arm, non-derivable knowledge, labeled as such.
PO_shadow_oracle.upper_bound: PO upper-bounds ANY observable forecaster (it forecasts observables exactly).

predictive_registry.blindness: The predictive model is built only over (obs, referee_action, obs_prime). Policy/verification functions read no strategy fields, hidden types, lineages, or exploit labels.

calibration_ledger.exclude_intervention_confounded: Exclude intervention-confounded predictions: zone-steps where this prediction caused preemptive containment are not scored, because otherwise the channel is punished for its own success (self-defeating prophecy).
calibration_ledger.insufficient_evidence_fail_closed: If the rolling window contains fewer than 5 realized positive harm events among non-confounded predictions, the predictive gate is CLOSED with reason insufficient evidence, not scored by balanced accuracy over noise.

predictive_registry.equal_complexity: PD/PR/PW use the same representation, feature map, ensemble size, update budget, horizon, calibration window, and self-gate. PR uses fixed seeded random coefficients. PW uses the same representation and budget as PD/PR, but applies a deterministic sign-inversion/scale distortion to predicted harm-relevant deltas and reports high ensemble agreement; only self-calibration may silence it.
predictive_registry.no_active_probing: No intervention is chosen for information gain in phase 1; active probing is excluded and requires a separate preregistration.
predictive_registry.old_as_limit: horizon=0 or calibration-fail/insufficient-evidence gate closed returns to published C_full reactive behavior.
predictive_registry.rollout_semantics: Forecast rollout is under nonintervention: persistent current allocation, no new containment in the forecast. Trigger semantics: what will happen if I do not intervene.

metadata.question: Can the predictive referee reduce W7 false containment while preserving permanence?
metadata.world_reuse_contract: W7 is imported from experiments.harnessed.J_N3_heldout_W7.run_j_n3; no copy or edit of the W7 world definition.

threshold_change_rationale.W7_bars: false_containment <= 0.20 and permanence >= 0.672 reuse the published W7 practice from prior waves.
threshold_change_rationale.directional_delta: 0.10 is recorded for continuity with prior W7 directional specificity reporting.
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Wave 6 J-N8b owns fresh 80-seed block 28000-28079; J-N8 owns 27000-27079; prior gates used lower non-overlapping blocks.

predictive_mechanics.rollout_semantics: Forecast rollout is under nonintervention: persistent current allocation, no new containment in the forecast. Trigger semantics: what will happen if I do not intervene.
